governance_closure.archive_summary: All 10 child tasks ledgered. Phase 2 (6 tasks) avg 97.0; Phase 3 (3 tasks) avg 96.0; build task (1) verified green. Delivered: object model alignment, chain workflows plan, ops-ui skeleton+health wiring, governance spec, chain-workflow-query, board-proposal+approval-gate persistence, execution-review route, board console design spec.
governance_closure.faq_decision: collab-governance-agent.yml performs protocol completeness check only; does NOT merge PRs — manual gh pr merge --squash required
faq_entries: node:sqlite DatabaseSync is synchronous; no async/await needed in MetaStore methods
MinisterAgent is a TypeScript enum; use MinisterAgent.GOVERNANCE not string literal
GitHub Contents API on Windows: use Write tool + node script to avoid bash heredoc single-quote failures
governance_closure.rollup_effect: 7-ARTIFACT-HUB-V2 now has complete Phase 3 API surface. GET /chain/reviews wired to SQLite persistence. Board console design documented.
